title: The Republic
author: Plato
content: “Until philosophers are kings, or the kings and princes of this world have the spirit and power of philosophy... cities will never have rest from their evils.”

title: The Nicomachean Ethics
author: Aristotle
content: “We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.”

title: Phaedo
author: Plato
content: “The soul is in the very likeness of the divine, and immortal, and intellectual, and uniform, and indissoluble, and unchangeable.”

title: Enchiridion
author: Epictetus
content: “Some things are within our power, while others are not.”

title: Apology
author: Plato
content: “The unexamined life is not worth living.”
